changelog: Complete visual redesign - modern, vibrant, mobile-first
Mascot character (🦁) guides users through the app
Daily goals system with progress tracking
Real leaderboard with actual user data
Bottom navigation bar for one-thumb use
Big round buttons, soft shadows, clean spacing
Focus mode - one exercise at a time
Swipeable lesson cards with visual progress
Shop with Streak Freeze, Hearts Refill, XP Boost
Simplified auth with mascot welcome screen
